text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We've passed a significant milestone, haven't we?
choice_data_list: I'm glad we made it through!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Trainer? It seems you've been moved to
tears yet again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You've been a leaky faucet ever since the Arima
Kinen. There, there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By the way, there's something I would like you to
see once you've finished wiping your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, do you remember the promise I wrote out
for you when we were getting started?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to present you with a favorite poem of
mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like before, Grass Wonder hands me a sheet
of paper.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open it up to see the warmest, gentlest brush
strokes of calligraphy I have ever seen. The poem
reads...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When spring comes again, and the years bring us
back here, may this day return. Let us share a
joyous drink—with plum petals in our hair.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'll make some delicious tea, so let's celebrate
spring together each year.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And please, continue to walk this path with me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We've still got a long, long way to go together!
